acceptance_criteria.text: Operator chat accepts a pasted manual review, stores it in LocalOS, generates a reply draft, and returns the draft in the chat response.
gaps: Direct provider publication remains intentionally unavailable.

acceptance_criteria.text: The manual review reply flow is billed as paid compute through credit preflight, reservation, charge finalization, and insufficient-balance blocking.
The dashboard exposes the chat-command flow and the reviews UI can display stored LocalOS reply drafts for manual copy/publish.
gaps: Authenticated visual QA of the Operator card was not run in this local task; production build passed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram owner chat routes the same manual review intent through the same backend service without bypassing credit or manual-publication policy.
gaps: No live Telegram message was sent during local verification.

acceptance_criteria.text: Map refresh execution remains gated: no direct Apify call by default; only a disabled internal enqueue boundary exists for future controlled rollout.
gaps: Real Apify execution and actual-cost credit settlement remain future work.

acceptance_criteria.text: Documentation reflects the implemented Sprint 15-19 capabilities and remaining gaps.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_manual_review.py src/services/operator_map_refresh.py src/services/operator_audit.py src/api/operator_api.py src/main.py src/telegram_bot.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_audit.py

python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
known_gaps: No commit, push, deploy, or production migration was performed.
Direct map reply publication remains manual.
Apify refresh remains behind a disabled internal boundary.
